_comment: Canonical wire shapes for the person-page reflective-layer entities, shared between the web (Vitest) and the iOS models (mobile/ios/scripts/verify-entities.sh). Nullable fields are written as explicit null, exactly as the web produces. Keep in step with frontend/src/types/domain.ts; a drift here should fail both suites.

turning_point.title: Leaving home
turning_point.description: A quiet decision that changed everything.
